speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Now then, let us begin the long afternoon."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Welcome to the story of the garden."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Let us enjoy the dance of distortion."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Have you heard the play at the world's end?"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Shall we have another tea party?"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "That bell will never ring again... no, let us not speak of it."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Let me make a doll of you."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Do not fret over failure. After all, you are already dead."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Dolls are such lovely things."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Let us raise the curtain on a stage where the dead dance."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "...heh... hehehe... heh..."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "This world is a beautiful nightmare."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "Do go ahead and break and humiliate each other to your heart's content."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_sama
sound: "All you need to prepare is a single ten-sided die."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "The time has come to show you my true power!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "I am perfect and beautiful!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "Th-there are people who don't like that sort of thing between girls, you know!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "There's no way you can match me, the perfect and elegant one!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "The supreme and solitary necromancer—that is I!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "I am NOT a good-for-nothing!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "I am a proper necromancer! I'll do it!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "Uwwwwwwwwwwwwww..."

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "Please don't call me by a pet name!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "Kyaaaaaaah!"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "Lun-lun-lun-loon~♪"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "Wha, a hundred-sided die...?"

speaker: mon_nec_ZQ_chang
sound: "Do you think you're lucky?"
